steps.title: Analyze the equation
steps.content: A perfect square is never negative, but the equation requires $$(x+81)^2=-256.$$ No real $x$ can satisfy this.

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: There are zero real solutions. That matches choice D — D is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches choice D, Zero, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore D is correct.
